webforge.description: WebForge — AI agent organization that builds and maintains websites

resume.description: Resume a WebForge session — read all memory, rules, and where we stopped

init.description: Initialize WebForge in the current project

on.description: Turn WebForge ON for current project

off.description: Turn WebForge OFF for current project (saves session)

status.description: Check WebForge status for current project

rules.description: List all rules (do's and don'ts) for this project

add-rule.description: Add a new rule. Usage: /add-rule <rule text>

add-adr.template:
WEBFORGE_PROJECT="$OPENCODE_CWD" python3 -c "
import sys
sys.path.insert(0, '{{.WebForge}}/mcp')
from memory import add_adr
import os
os.environ['WEBFORGE_PROJECT'] = os.environ.get('OPENCODE_CWD', '.')
parts = '$1'.split('|')
if len(parts) >= 3:
    print(add_adr(parts[0].strip(), parts[1].strip(), parts[2].strip(), parts[3].strip() if len(parts) > 3 else '').to_dict())
else:
    print('Usage: /add-adr <title> | <context> | <decision> | <consequences>')
"

session-log.description: Read the last 7 days of session logs

stop.description: Mark end of session — where you stopped, what's next. Usage: /stop <summary>
